about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We believe that everyone deserves access to quality products at fair prices, delivered with exceptional service.
about.missionText: Our mission is to provide a curated selection of high-quality products, offer competitive pricing without compromising on quality, deliver exceptional customer service, and make online shopping accessible and enjoyable for everyone.
about.quality: Quality - We only stock products that meet our high standards.
about.value: Value - We offer competitive prices without compromising on quality.
about.service: Service - Exceptional customer support is our priority.
about.sustainability: Sustainability - We're committed to reducing our environmental impact.

help.title: Help Center
help.howToOrder: How do I place an order?
help.howToOrderText: Simply browse our products, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout. You can pay with credit card, PayPal, or other available payment methods.
help.freeShippingText: Yes! We offer free standard shipping on all orders over $50.
help.howToTrack: How can I track my order?
help.howToTrackText: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can also track your order in the Order History section of your account.
help.howToReturn: How do I return an item?
help.howToReturnText: Contact our customer support team or initiate a return through your account. Refunds are typically processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item.
help.forgotPassword: I forgot my password. What should I do?
help.forgotPasswordText: Click Forgot Password on the login page and enter your email address. You'll receive a link to reset your password.
help.updateAccount: How do I update my account information?
help.updateAccountText: Log in to your account and visit the Profile section to update your personal information, addresses, and preferences.

returns.title: Returns Policy
returns.intro: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you're not happy with your order, we offer a straightforward returns policy to make the process as easy as possible.
returns.eligibleItemsList: Items must be unused, unwashed, and in original packaging with all tags attached.
returns.notEligible: The following items cannot be returned:
returns.notEligibleList: Gift cards, Downloadable software products, Personalized or custom-made items
returns.howToReturnSteps: Log into your account and go to your Order History. Select the order containing the item(s) you wish to return. Click Request Return and select the items to return. Print the prepaid shipping label and drop off the package.
returns.alternativeReturn: Alternatively, you can contact our customer service team at returns@ecommerce.com with your order number and details of the items you wish to return.
returns.refundsText: Refunds will be processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item. The refund will be credited to your original payment method.
returns.lateRefundsText: If you haven't received a refund yet, first check your bank account again. Next, contact your credit card company. It may take some time before your refund is officially posted.
returns.exchangesText: We only replace items if they are defective or damaged. If you need to exchange a defective or damaged item for the same item, send us an email at exchanges@ecommerce.com with your order number and photos of the defect or damage.
returns.differentItem: If you would like to exchange an item for a different size or color, you will need to return the original item and place a new order.
returns.damagedDefectiveText: If you received a damaged or defective item, please contact us immediately at support@ecommerce.com with your order number and photos of the damage or defect. We will arrange for a replacement or full refund at no additional cost to you.
returns.internationalText: For international orders, the customer is responsible for all return shipping costs, customs duties, and taxes. We recommend using a shipping method that provides tracking and insurance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.financialData: Financial Data - Payment card details (processed securely by our payment providers)
privacy.transactionData: Transaction Data - Details about payments to and from you and other details of products you have purchased
privacy.technicalData: Technical Data - IP address, browser type and version, time zone setting, browser plug-in types and versions
privacy.usageData: Usage Data - Information about how you use our website, products and services
privacy.useList: To process and deliver your order including managing payments and delivery, To manage your account and maintain your relationship with us, To improve our website, products, and services, To send you marketing communications (with your consent)

security.title: Security
security.intro: We take the security of your personal information seriously. Here are the measures we implement to protect your data.
security.dataAtRest: Data at Rest - Sensitive data stored in our systems is encrypted using AES-256 encryption
security.secureSessions: Secure Sessions - Your login sessions are protected with secure, encrypted tokens
security.passwordProtection: Password Protection - Passwords are hashed using bcrypt and never stored in plain text
security.twoFactor: Two-Factor Authentication - Optional 2FA adds an extra layer of security to your account
security.sessionManagement: Session Management - Automatic logout after periods of inactivity
security.loginNotifications: Login Notifications - Email alerts for new device logins
security.bestPracticesList: Use a strong, unique password for your account, Enable two-factor authentication when available, Keep your software and browsers up to date, Be cautious of phishing attempts

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and provide personalized content.
cookies.cookiesExplanation: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit websites. They help remember your preferences and improve your experience.
cookies.essential: Essential Cookies - Required for the website to function properly (authentication, shopping cart, checkout)
cookies.analytics: Analytics Cookies - Help us understand how visitors interact with our website
cookies.functional: Functional Cookies - Enable enhanced functionality and personalization
cookies.marketing: Marketing Cookies - Used to deliver relevant advertisements
cookies.managingCookiesText: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings. Note that blocking essential cookies may affect the functionality of our website, particularly the shopping cart and checkout process.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
terms.accountTermsText: When you create an account with us, you must provide us information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the Terms, which may result in immediate termination of your account on our Site.
terms.passwordResponsibility: You are responsible for safeguarding the password that you use to access the Site and for any activities or actions under your password.
terms.termination: We may suspend or terminate your account at any time for any reason at our sole discretion.
terms.productsPricingText: All descriptions of products or product pricing are subject to change at any time without notice, at the sole discretion of us. We reserve the right to discontinue any product at any time.
terms.warrantyText: We do not warrant that the quality of any products, services, information, or other material purchased or obtained by you will meet your expectations, or that any errors in the Service will be corrected.
terms.purchasesText: You agree to provide current, complete, and accurate purchase and account information for all purchases made via the Site. You further agree to promptly update account and payment information, including email address, payment method, and payment card expiration date.
terms.shippingText: We offer various shipping options which will be presented to you during the checkout process. Delivery times are estimates and are not guaranteed. We are not responsible for delays caused by factors outside our control.
terms.governingLawText: These Terms shall be governed by and defined following the laws of the jurisdiction in which the Company is registered. The Company's ability to seek injunctive or other equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction is not affected by this provision.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: Join our team and help shape the future of e-commerce.
careers.benefitsList: Competitive salary and equity, Health and dental insurance, Home office setup stipend, Employee discount on all products

blog.title: Blog
blog.intro: Stay updated with the latest news, product launches, and shopping tips.
blog.spotlights: Product Spotlights - Deep dives into our latest products and collections
blog.guides: Shopping Guides - Tips and tricks for smart online shopping
blog.subscribe: Subscribe to our newsletter using the form in the footer. We send updates once a week with our best content, exclusive deals, and early access to new products.
